title: Our Courses
subtitle: Learn, grow, and integrate into Norwegian society

digitalVerden.name: Digital World
digitalVerden.description: Everything from a translator to anything you need help with.

norskKursB1.name: Course: «Vi lærer norsk»
norskKursB1.description:
Free, organized for active members of the Ukrainian union in Drammen and surroundings «MriJa».
Course goal: to deepen your knowledge of the Norwegian language.
Main topics / content:
familieliv, barn og barneoppdragelse, livsgang, bolig og privat økonomi, jobbsøking, i arbeid, helse og livstil and other topics.
Format: work in a small group. Uses presentations, exercises, tables, games, cards, etc.
Target audience: Adults.

yogaCourse.name: Yoga Course
yogaCourse.description: Yoga classes for physical and mental well-being.
